title: Accounts
subtitle: Your bank, cash, and card accounts and their balances.

list.title: Your accounts
list.empty: No accounts yet. Add your first account to track its balance and your net worth.

currency.label: Currency
currency.lockedHelper: Currency can't be changed after an account is created.

openingBalance.label: Opening balance
openingBalance.helper: The balance when you start tracking this account.

form.saveError: We couldn't save this account. Check your connection and try again.

error.title: Can't load your accounts
error.description: We couldn't reach the server to load your accounts. Check your connection and try again.

netWorth.title: Net worth
netWorth.subtitle: Total across your accounts
netWorth.empty: Add an account to see your net worth here.
netWorth.degradeNote: Totalled in each account's own currency — add a USD transaction with a rate to convert.
netWorth.errorDescription: We couldn't load your net worth right now. Try again.
